title: RHCSA 10 Lab 01: Hostname Resolution
description: Configure persistent hostname and local name resolution

tasks: Set the persistent hostname to client10.lab.example.
Add a persistent hosts entry mapping server10.lab.example to 192.168.122.3.
Verify local hostname and name resolution.
hints: Use hostnamectl for the static hostname.
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.

Add a persistent hosts entry mapping server10.lab.example to 192.168.122
Verify local hostname and name resolution
